demo.title: megapot.sh
demo.code:
# Read the live drawing state
bankr prompt "Using the megapot skill, what's the jackpot at?"

# Buy 5 random ("quick-pick") tickets
bankr prompt "Using the megapot skill, buy 5 random megapot tickets"

# Buy a custom-number ticket (validated client-side before submission)
bankr prompt "Using the megapot skill, buy a ticket with numbers 1 6 16 22 25 bonus 4"

# Subscribe to one ticket per day
bankr prompt "Using the megapot skill, buy me a megapot ticket every day"

# Discover and claim any unclaimed winnings
bankr prompt "Using the megapot skill, did I win anything? If so, claim them."

setup: Requires the [bankr skill](https://github.com/BankrBot/skills/tree/main/bankr) for wallet signing and submission on Base (chain ID `8453`)
Fund the wallet with USDC for tickets plus a small amount of ETH for gas
